name: Roquefort and Asiago Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. In a bowl, mix breadcrumbs, asiago cheese, and melted butter until well combined.
3. Press the mixture into the bottom and up the sides of a 10-inch springform pan.
4. In a skillet over medium heat, cook onion with butter for 4-5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until softened without browning. Remove from heat and let cool.
5. In another bowl, combine cream cheese and roquefort cheese. Mix well.
6. Add cream and salt to the mixture. Beat in one egg at a time until incorporated.
7. Stir in the onion mixture.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared crust.
9. Bake for 60 minutes or until set. Remove from oven and let cool completely before serving.
